## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences. What changed and why. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Performance
- [ ] Build / tooling
- [ ] Other:

## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all --check` passes
- [ ] `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings` passes
- [ ] `cargo test --workspace` passes
- [ ] No new `.unwrap()` / `.expect()` in non-test code
- [ ] New `unsafe` blocks carry `// SAFETY:` comments
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` if user-visible
- [ ] No proprietary names / internal paths / personal identifiers introduced
